title: PS2 CRAFT - Zombie Survival Horror Edition
description: A Minecraft Modpack that replicates the feelings you get when playing early PS2 horror games like Resident Evil, Silent Hill & Fatal Frame..
body:
![Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2872a412533c11979e8016ab43a77a23d8a71823.png)

## What to Expect?
> This Minecraft: PS2 Edition modpack features popular horror mods like From The Fog and From The Caves to create a fully immersive survival horror game experience similar to games like Silent Hill 2, Resident Evil and Fatal Frame. There's also zombie mods, immersive player animation and sound pack mods. 

> With the new update spawning is immediately tense and DANGEROUS. You will spawn in a village and there's a chance for it to be a infected zombie town. Fortunately, you begin with a starter kit that equips you with a pistol, ammo and lantern! Stay alert and stay quiet (they can hear you...literally!).

> Intitialy this modpack was not intended to be played in multiplayer but it should work fine in the newest modpack version. If you go to older versions of the modpack multiplayer will NOT work.

> Created by RoseRocket this modpack was originally meant as a regular Minecraft series meant to be played with The Broken Script and TBS Patch mods installed. However after diving deeper I decided to add more to the project. While they are no longer in the modpack... I would reccommend downloading those manually if you want them for a fully immersive experience. These mods are NOT required. Completely optional!

### Versions?
> Currently this modpack is only available on 1.20.1 Forge. It is still in its early stages of development and may update overtime. Earlier versions of the modpack can be found on CurseForge.

> ***2.0 UPDATE*** this new update focuses on infection mods. If you don't want your world destroyed its best to disable it. 

### Any Questions?
> For further information, join my [discord server](https://discord.gg/m3UWQxZvT6) and use the ticket channel.
